insights.title: Recommendations for you
insights.bestHour: Your audience responds best around {{hour}} — schedule your next post then.
insights.bestWeekday: {{day}} is your strongest day for engagement.
insights.bestPlatform: {{platform}} drives your highest engagement per post.
insights.bestFormat: Your best-performing format is {{format}} — lean into it.
insights.trendUp: You published {{percent}}% more than last week. Keep the rhythm!
insights.trendDown: Publishing dropped {{percent}}% vs last week — a quick post today keeps you visible.
